pollInterval.markdownDescription:
Interval for checking changes to config/resource files

Defines the interval (e.g., '10s') for checking modifications to files on disk. If set to null or empty value, changes to config and resource files are not polled.

restartPipeline.markdownDescription:
Restart pipeline when config files are changed on disk

Controls whether to watch for modifications to [configuration files](https://doc.log10x.com/config/). Modifications will initiate a pipeline graceful restart. This setting can operate in conjunction with [GitHub config sync](https://doc.log10x.com/config/github/) to allow pipelines to reload/restart from a centralized configuration repository at run time. (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: true)
